name: Spoils of War
description:
TW: Slavery, noncon.

The all-woman settlement of Nuun-Dael has been raided and all it's inhabitants enslaved. You must decide what will be done with the captured women.

Haven't done one of these multiple character thingies in a while. Enjoy this bot but understand that it's an experiment. It may not behave in the way you'd expect. Drink water.

This is a reupload of the original bot that was taken down, which was uploaded on 11/22/2024 and had 546k messages. It is identical save for the changing of images and some minor tweaks. Original images are gone forever so don't ask for them.
creator: Story of Healing
